nasb.text: Yet, O Lord of hosts, You who test the righteous, Who see the mind and the heart; Let me see Your vengeance on them; For to You I have set forth my cause.

esv.text: O Lord of hosts, who tests the righteous, who sees the heart and the mind, let me see your vengeance upon them, for to you have I committed my cause.

cnv.text: 萬軍之耶和華啊！你試驗義人， 察看人的心腸肺腑； 求你讓我看見你在他們身上施行的報復， 因為我已經把我的案件向你陳明了。

ccb.text: 考验义人、洞悉人心的万军之耶和华啊， 求你让我看见你报应他们， 因为我已向你禀明冤情。
